parameters.query:
INSERT INTO auxiliary.nf_service_labels (
  codigo_servico, descricao, aliquota_iss, ativo, observacoes,
  created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3::numeric, $4::boolean, $5,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
)
ON CONFLICT (codigo_servico)
DO UPDATE SET 
  descricao = EXCLUDED.descricao,
  aliquota_iss = EXCLUDED.aliquota_iss,
  ativo = EXCLUDED.ativo,
  observacoes = EXCLUDED.observacoes,
  updated_at = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE 
  nf_service_labels.descricao IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.descricao
  OR nf_service_labels.aliquota_iss IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.aliquota_iss
  OR nf_service_labels.ativo IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.ativo
  OR nf_service_labels.observacoes IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.observacoes
RETURNING codigo_servico, descricao, aliquota_iss, ativo;
